metadata.description: Directory-submission and product-marketing skills for link-profile diversity — easy, automatable directory and business-profile submissions. Forked from coreyhaines31/marketingskills (MIT).

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Two skills: directory-submissions (easy, repeatable directory + business/content profile submissions for referring-domain diversity, with a conditional local/GBP layer) and product-marketing (the shared product-context document all skills read first).
